texts.orig: Credit Score Tiers and Loan Limits
texts.text: Credit Score Tiers and Loan Limits

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our lending decisions are based on credit score tiers that determine maximum loan amounts and approval requirements.
texts.text: Our lending decisions are based on credit score tiers that determine maximum loan amounts and approval requirements.

texts.text: Process: Approval with income verification required

texts.text: Exceptions: CEO approval required for exceptional circumstances

texts.text: Requirements: Significant compensating factors, substantial down payment or collateral

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All credit scores must be obtained from at least two of the three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion). The middle score will be used for tier determination.
texts.text: All credit scores must be obtained from at least two of the three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion). The middle score will be used for tier determination.

texts.text: DTI = (Total Monthly Debt Payments / Gross Monthly Income) × 100
